Lavandula angustifolia, commonly known as lavender, is a flowering plant in the mint family. The health benefits of lavender include its calming and soothing effects, which can help reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression. Lavender contains bioactive constituents such as linalool and linalyl acetate, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
